name: Crab Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the bread into small pieces.
2. Moisten the bread pieces with milk.
3. Add mayonnaise, worcestershire sauce, parsley, baking powder, old bay seasoning, salt, and beaten egg to the bread pieces. Mix until well combined.
4. Shape the mixture into crab cakes.
5. Fry or broil the crab cakes until golden brown.
